info.description: API server for managing AI Services catalog, applications, and authentication
info.title: AI Services Catalog API

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all applications for the authenticated user with optional filters

post.description: Creates a new application (architecture or service) with optional custom parameters

400.description: Invalid request body or validation errors

422.description: Parameter validation failed or invalid template

get.description: Retrieves a single application by its unique identifier for the authenticated user

put.description: Updates the display name of an existing application

400.description: Invalid request body or name validation failed

delete.description: Initiates async deletion of an application and all its resources. Returns 202 immediately.

parameters.description: When 'true', preserves underlying data (volumes of databases/service resources). Default: 'false'
parameters.name: keep_data

400.description: Invalid application ID or keep_data parameter

get.description: Retrieves the process status and runtime information for an application
Retrieves used and total allocated CPU (in cores) and memory usage (in bytes), along with the hardware accelerator cards for an application and its services
Retrieves a list of all available architecture templates with summary information

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing access token

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific architecture template

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing access token

get.description: Retrieves available providers and dependency rules for all services and their components within an architecture

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing access token

post.description: Authenticate user and return access and refresh tokens

get.description: Get information about the currently authenticated user

200.description: Returns user id, username, and name

post.description: Get new access and refresh tokens using a valid refresh token

200.description: Returns new access_token, refresh_token, and token_type

get.description: Retrieves the configuration schema (JSON Schema) for a specific provider within a component type. Returns a JSON Schema object with properties that may include x-data-id for fields that should be populated from metadata specifications.

200.description: JSON Schema object with $schema, type, and properties. Properties may include x-data-id field indicating data should be populated from metadata specifications (e.g., supported_models)

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid component_type or provider_id

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing access token

404.description: Component type or provider not found

get.description: Retrieves system resource information including CPU, memory, and accelerator availability

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing access token

get.description: Retrieves a list of all deployable service templates. Dependency-only services are excluded from this list. Returns service summaries including standalone flag without endpoints and pod templates.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing access token

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific service template

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing access token

get.description: Retrieves available providers and dependency rules for a specific service

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing access token

get.description: Retrieves the configuration schema (JSON Schema) for a specific service. Returns a JSON Schema object with properties that define the service's configurable parameters.

200.description: JSON Schema object with $schema, type, and properties defining service parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing access token

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization

tags.description: Catalog endpoints for architectures and services
tags.name: Catalog
